name: Profiled 2.0 — AI Career Architect
desc: End-to-end AI career intelligence system that scrapes live job postings and computes ATS-style fit using NLP-based skill extraction and a FastAPI + PostgreSQL backend.

name: VITALS-AI
desc: Production-oriented biomedical vision system that estimates heart and respiration rates from standard RGB video using an MTTS-CAN-inspired deep learning architecture.

name: AquaVisor — FloodSense AI
desc: AI-powered flood-risk decision platform fusing satellite imagery and real-time weather signals into interactive risk maps and dashboards for city-scale early warning.

name: Synapse AI Terminal
desc: AI-augmented dual-mode terminal (CLI + web UI) wired to Gemini for translating natural-language commands into safe, auditable shell operations and system monitoring.

name: SourceFlow
desc: React + TypeScript context-packaging extension that ingests full repositories into token-optimized, LLM-ready prompts for deep architectural analysis.

name: CoLab
desc: Browser-based collaborative development environment featuring real-time multi-user state synchronization and low-latency updates across shared artifacts.

name: CrowdFadeAI
desc: Privacy-first video pipeline running real-time face re-identification via ArcFace and ONNX Runtime on CUDA to selectively blur bystanders while keeping the primary subject sharp.

name: PantryIQ
desc: Intelligent culinary recommender system using a greedy-graph-backtracking algorithmic pipeline to compute optimal, waste-minimizing meal plans from pantry inventory.

name: ArogyaSaathi
desc: Production-grade cardiovascular risk platform coupling a Random Forest ML pipeline with a Flask API to deliver highly accurate, clinically explainable predictions.

name: Tryvity
desc: Manifest V3 Chrome extension bringing AI-powered virtual try-on to major e-commerce sites by orchestrating multi-modal calls to Gemini Flash via DOM context detection.
